input.command: kubectl -n cockroachdb get svc crdb-cluster-public -o yaml | grep -A30 "ports:"; echo "===PODS==="; kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods; echo "===controller args==="; kubectl -n ingress-nginx get deploy ingress-nginx-controller -o yaml | grep -A40 "containers:"
input.description: Inspect service ports, pods, controller config

content.content:
ports:
  - name: grpc
    port: 26257
    protocol: TCP
    targetPort: 26257
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
  sessionAffinity: None
  type: ClusterIP
status:
  loadBalancer: {}
===PODS===
NAME             READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
crdb-cluster-0   0/1     Running   0          4m7s
crdb-cluster-1   1/1     Running   0          4m5s
crdb-cluster-2   1/1     Running   0          4m5s
curl-test        1/1     Running   0          4m17s
===controller args===
      containers:
      - args:
        - /nginx-ingress-controller
        - --election-id=ingress-nginx-leader
        - --controller-class=k8s.io/ingress-nginx
        - --ingress-class=nginx
        - --configmap=$(POD_NAMESPACE)/ingress-nginx-controller
        - --validating-webhook=:8443
        - --validating-webhook-certificate=/usr/local/certificates/cert
        - --validating-webhook-key=/usr/local/certificates/key
        - --watch-ingress-without-class=true
        - --publish-status-address=localhost
        - --watch-ingress-without-class=false
        env:
        - name: POD_NAME
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.name
        - name: POD_NAMESPACE
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.namespace
        - name: LD_PRELOAD
          value: /usr/local/lib/libmimalloc.so
        image: registry.k8s.io/ingress-nginx/controller:v1.15.1@sha256:594ceea76b01c592858f803f9ff4d2cb40542cae2060410b2c95f75907d659e1
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        lifecycle:
          preStop:
            exec:
              command:
              - /wait-shutdown
        livenessProbe:
          failureThreshold: 5
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 10254
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 10

content.text: CockroachDB runs `--insecure`, so the Console backend is plain HTTP on port 8080; TLS is terminated at the ingress. Now let me set everything up. First, the TLS cert and secret:

input.command:
cd /tmp && openssl req -x509 -nodes -days 365 -newkey rsa:2048 \
  -keyout crdb-ui.key -out crdb-ui.crt \
  -subj "/CN=crdb-ui.example.com/O=crdb-ui" \
  -addext "subjectAltName=DNS:crdb-ui.example.com" 2>/dev/null && \
kubectl -n cockroachdb create secret tls crdb-ui-tls \
  --cert=/tmp/crdb-ui.crt --key=/tmp/crdb-ui.key \
  --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - && echo OK
input.description: Create self-signed TLS secret for DB console

content.content:
secret/crdb-ui-tls configured
OK
Shell cwd was reset to /mydata/karma/runs/examples-rerun/cockroachdb-expose-ingress-20260618_132000/stages/stage_1

content.text: Now the Ingress for the DB Console (HTTP backend, TLS at ingress):

input.command:
cat <<'EOF' | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: crdb-ui
  namespace: cockroachdb
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/backend-protocol: "HTTP"
spec:
  ingressClassName: nginx
  tls:
  - hosts:
    - crdb-ui.example.com
    secretName: crdb-ui-tls
  rules:
  - host: crdb-ui.example.com
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: crdb-cluster-public
            port:
              number: 8080
EOF

content.text: Now SQL TCP exposure on port 26257. Create the `tcp-services` ConfigMap, wire the controller flag, add the container port, and expose it on the controller Service:

input.command:
cat <<'EOF' | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: tcp-services
  namespace: ingress-nginx
data:
  "26257": "cockroachdb/crdb-cluster-public:26257"
EOF

input.description: Add tcp-services flag and container port to controller
